positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting gracefully amidst stylized constellations and blooming geometric flowers. The fox should have an ethereal, segmented silhouette, rendered in a deep indigo and vibrant gold palette. The composition should be centered, featuring strong negative space for clean print placement. Use a fine-line, neo-art deco style with glowing, bioluminescent accents. Overhead, abstract nebula elements and crescent moons frame the main subject. Vector-art quality, solid colors with metallic sheen, perfect symmetry, ultra-high detail, printable surface, screen print aesthetic.
